fields.title: Add explicit git outcome executor for Autoresearch keep and non-keep results
fields.description: Implement the real git mutation path for log_experiment outcomes. This isolates the highest-risk part of the port: preserving sidecar files while committing or reverting worktree changes safely, especially when workingDir differs from ctx.cwd.
fields.design: Extend the adapter-side execution boundary with commitKeep and revertNonKeep implementations. commitKeep stages and commits with the generated message and returns the final short SHA. revertNonKeep preserves the exact resolved sidecar file set and reverts the rest. Fail clearly when the effective work dir is not inside a git repo or when subagent mode forbids git mutation. Tests must cover relative and absolute workingDir values and a work dir nested under the repo root.
